code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut target = ""
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    target = s
  when None
    target = ""
  end

  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(body)
  mut count = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(body, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          if current == target
            count = count + 1
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    if current == target
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
end
